full_description: FocusTimer is a productivity app that helps users stay focused and on track with the Pomodoro Technique. It provides a simple and customizable timer to boost productivity. With FocusTimer, you can work in focused 25-minute increments, called Pomodoros, separated by 5-minute breaks. After four Pomodoros, you can take a longer break of 15-30 minutes. This technique can help you stay focused, avoid burnout, and maintain a sustainable work pace. The app is highly customizable, allowing you to adjust the length of your work sessions, breaks, and long breaks to suit your needs. You can also choose from different sound options and notification settings to stay on track. FocusTimer is perfect for students, freelancers, and anyone looking to improve their productivity and time management skills.
